name: ai-visual-director
description: Claude Code skill for turning stories into visual development boards and AI video prompt packages.

scripts.test: npm run test:unit && npm run test:integration && npm run test:governance
scripts.test:governance: npm run test:gov:p0 && npm run test:gov:p1 && npm run test:gov:p2 && npm run test:gov:p3
scripts.test:gov:p0: node tests/unit/command-gate.test.mjs && node tests/unit/format-contract.test.mjs && node tests/unit/lock-state.test.mjs && node tests/unit/asset-purpose.test.mjs && node tests/unit/no-explore-by-default.test.mjs
scripts.test:gov:p2: node tests/unit/portrait-quality.test.mjs && node tests/unit/prompt-qc.test.mjs && node tests/integration/video-safe-reference.test.mjs && node tests/unit/declutter.test.mjs
scripts.test:gov:p3: node tests/unit/fusion-explicit-trigger.test.mjs && node tests/unit/multi-version-derived.test.mjs && node tests/unit/style-migration-commit.test.mjs && node tests/unit/series-continuity.test.mjs
